title: Operation Bluestar anniversary: Akal Takht chief flays AAP govt. in Punjab over anti-sacrilege law
description: Activists of radical Sikh outfit Dal Khalsa, along with hardliners owing allegiance to Shiromani Akali Dal (Amritsar) chief Simranjit Singh Mann, raised slogans in support of Khalistan during a congregation of Sikh devotees
